message: From now on, when I say 'deploy' I mean push to staging first, not production.
My timezone is Europe/London, use that for any time references.
I prefer tabs over spaces. 4-width tabs.
When writing commit messages, use conventional commits format.
Actually, change the tab preference — use 2 spaces instead. Team decided.
Don't use emoji in commit messages. Plain text only.
Our branch naming convention is feature/TICKET-description, e.g. feature/API-123-add-auth.
Database migrations always need a rollback script alongside them.
When I say 'the cluster' I mean the k8s staging cluster at staging.internal.
Remind me what formatting preferences we've set up.
